purpose: Add X.com social identity and receipt metadata references to the L4 review surface without converting social presence into authority or mint execution.

receipt_layer.label: Receipts
receipt_layer.verification_requirement: A future verifier must bind this marker to concrete receipt files, commit SHAs, transaction hashes, platform URLs, or another replayable evidence source before it can be treated as verified.

metadata_rules: Social handles may identify a publication surface but do not prove execution by themselves.
A reported receipt marker must remain REPORTED until bound to replayable evidence.
Do not infer ownership, audience size, monetary value, or mint status from a handle alone.
Use X.com references as discovery metadata, not canonical proof.
Keep Zora, Base, GitHub, and X receipts separate unless a bundle index explicitly links them.
operator_pattern: Do not verify until evidence is attached.
Attach receipts in a later artifact.
Update the bundle index only after artifact creation.

next_lawful_moves: Create an X receipt capture artifact with concrete post URLs or archive hashes.
Bind the 50000 receipt marker to replayable evidence before verification.
Reference this layer from the next L4 bundle index revision.
